title: FE-09 - Implementation Map For Current Codebase
description: Map truc tiep FE-09 vao codebase Modular Monolith hien tai. Muc tieu la build mot API synchronous, cache-backed, khong them migration, va khong pha boundary giua LlmAssistant va TestExecution.

techStack.cache: LlmSuggestionCache trong PostgreSQL cho explanation cache; IDistributedCache cua TestExecution da ton tai cho run results
techStack.architecture: Modular Monolith (CQRS via Dispatcher, IRepository<T,Guid>, schema isolation, cross-module contracts)

missingForFe09: Cross-module failure read gateway de assemble failed case explanation context

usageForFe09: Lay endpoint metadata va response schema payload fallback cho prompt

moduleStructure.description: Khong tao module moi. Khong dung Background host cho FE-09 v1. Chi them contract gateway o Contracts/TestExecution, implementation o TestExecution, va API/runtime surface trong LlmAssistant.

addedFiles.description: Cross-module DTO gom access context, original test case definition, actual failed result.
Read gateway contract tu TestExecution sang LlmAssistant.
Gateway implementation doc TestRun + cache payload + test case definition.
GET cached explanation + POST generate explanation.
CQRS command + handler tao explanation on demand.
CQRS query tra cached explanation neu da ton tai.
API response model cho FE-09.
Internal prompt contract cho provider request.
Internal parsed provider response contract.
Provider/model/cache/webhook config cho FE-09.
Top-level explainer contract.
Pipeline: sanitize -> fingerprint -> cache -> prompt -> provider -> audit -> cache.
Deterministic cache-key builder.
SHA256-based fingerprint implementation.
Sensitive-data masking contract.
Mask headers/body/variables before prompt/audit/cache.
Prompt builder contract.
Map deterministic context thanh structured prompt.
Provider client contract.
HttpClient-based provider or n8n caller cho FE-09.

modifiedFiles.change: Register FE-09 services and named HttpClient.
Add Modules:LlmAssistant section with FailureExplanation config.
Add dev webhook/model config if project keeps local overrides there.

unchangedFiles: ClassifiedAds.Migrator/ - no new migration files for FE-09 v1.
ClassifiedAds.Background/ - no host registration changes in synchronous v1.
Entities/LlmInteraction.cs - reuse existing FailureExplanation enum value.
Entities/TestRun.cs - reuse existing run summary and RedisKey.

notes: Chi tiet run van nam trong distributed cache cua FE-07/08; FE-09 khong duoc can thiep storage pattern do.
Explanation cache la serialized JSON trong llmassistant.LlmSuggestionCaches, khong can bang moi.

mandatory: TestFailureReadGatewayService chi duoc deserialize 1 cache payload moi request explanation.
Khong duoc query per failure reason hoac per response header.
Cho v1, duoc phep goi GetExecutionContextAsync(testSuiteId, null) mot lan va filter testCaseId trong memory.
Khong duoc goi live provider neu cache hit.
forbidden: LlmAssistant doc IDistributedCache truc tiep bang RedisKey cua TestRun.
Them retry queue hoac Background worker vao FE-09 v1 prompt nay.
Them migration chi de luu explanation.

flows.name: Explain Failure
steps: 2. Handler load failed-context qua ITestFailureReadGatewayService va validate owner.
3. Handler load endpoint metadata neu endpointId co gia tri.
4. LlmFailureExplainer sanitize -> build fingerprint -> cache lookup.
5. Neu cache miss: build prompt -> provider call -> save interaction -> cache explanation.

flows.name: Get Cached Explanation
steps: 2. Query handler load same failed-context de xac nhan owner va compute cache key.
3. Query handler doc cached explanation va tra 404 neu chua co.

qualityGates: Khong them migration, entity, hoac DbSet moi.
Khong direct reference TestExecution repositories or cache tu LlmAssistant.
Khong de provider response override deterministic verdict.
Khong ghi raw secrets vao prompt, cache, hoac interaction log.
Khong implement async queue worker trong pass nay.

unitTests: TestFailureReadGatewayServiceTests (expired results, passed case conflict, missing case, successful mapping).
FailureExplanationFingerprintBuilderTests (deterministic key, ignores masked-secret variations where expected).
FailureExplanationPromptBuilderTests (includes deterministic sections, excludes raw secrets).
LlmFailureExplainerTests (cache hit, cache miss, provider failure, audit failure graceful, cache save failure graceful).
ExplainTestFailureCommandHandlerTests (owner validation, metadata optional path, service invocation).
GetFailureExplanationQueryHandlerTests (cache hit returns model, cache miss returns not found).
integrationTests: Optional thin controller tests for GET/POST route binding and permission attribute if repo already keeps controller auth tests.
Optional module wiring test for DI registration if needed.

knownTradeoffs: V1 prompt context se dung original test case request definition + actual resolved URL/result payload. No khong luu full resolved request body snapshot tu FE-07/08.
Neu explanation quality can body snapshot thuc te cao hon, co the mo rong cache payload cua TestExecution o mot follow-up nho sau FE-09.
implementationSequence: 3. LlmAssistant runtime services (sanitizer, fingerprint, prompt, client, explainer)
